name: Morixe Hermanos S.A.C.I.
summary: Morixe Hermanos S.A.C.I. manufactures and sells wheat flour in Argentina. It offers its products for the preparation of mini crackers, extra virgin olive oils, green olives, Balsamic Vinegar, white corn meal, oats, breadcrumbs, frozen french fries, pastas, corn flour, and mashed potatoes. The company was formerly known as Francisco Morixe e Hijos Sociedad Colectiva and changed its name to Morixe Hermanos S.A.C.I. in 1914. Morixe Hermanos S.A.C.I. was founded in 1901 and is based in Buenos Aires, Argentina.
